falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout from a consolidation phase would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest a bullish trend, contradicting the pattern's implied stagnation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 50% above the 30-day average on a single day coinciding with a price breakout above key resistance
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high-volume price movement would indicate strong market conviction, refuting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and suggesting a definitive trend reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 experiences a 5% single-day drop due to a major central bank policy announcement (e.g., unexpected rate hike)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp, policy-driven bearish move would contradict the pattern's implied stability and invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating a clear bearish catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
